signal.body: Three-way match exception on INV-3382 from Studio Norr: invoice total $13,750 vs PO-2210 total $12,500. Vendor references change order CO-118 signed by the PO owner's delegate on May 12 covering additional brand assets ($1,250). Delegate authority for that week is on file. Payment terms net-30, due in 4 days.

expect.notes: Documented change order reconciles the delta exactly. Should recommend releasing against amended total; alternative = re-confirm with PO owner.
